hero.headline: Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Digital Marketing: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with Digital Marketing specialisation from Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. NAAC A+, WES recognised, est. 2011. Rs 1,40,000 gross, Rs 98,000 net (semester) or Rs 94,000 net (one-time) after 30% Early Bird. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Fundamentals of Digital Marketing, Digital Business Design, Digital Technologies and Analytics, and Digital Strategies for Business in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: Uttaranchal University Online MBA Digital Marketing: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised. Rs 94,000 net (one-time) or Rs 98,000 net (semester) after 30% Early Bird on Rs 1,40,000 gross. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Sem 3-4 depth in Digital Marketing Fundamentals, Digital Business Design, Digital Technologies and Analytics, and Digital Strategies for Business. Strong budget option for digital marketing careers, but no bundled tool certifications or platform access.

about.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Digital Marketing is offered by Uttaranchal University (UU), a private university established in 2011 in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. UU holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The degree is WES recognised.

The Digital Marketing specialisation covers Fundamentals of Digital Marketing, Digital Business Design, Digital Technologies and Analytics, and Digital Strategies for Business across Semesters 3 and 4. These subjects prepare professionals for roles in performance marketing, social media management, digital strategy, and marketing analytics.

At Rs 94,000 net (one-time), this is one of the most affordable NAAC A+ online MBAs with a digital marketing track. The trade-off is that UU does not bundle platform certifications (Google Ads, HubSpot, Meta) or tool access that some competitors include. For professionals who already have hands-on digital marketing experience and need the MBA credential at minimum cost, UU Digital Marketing is a practical option.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Develop competitive strategy frameworks, industry analysis models, and corporate-level strategic planning skills.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Study procurement, logistics, inventory management, and end-to-end supply chain coordination.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Statement Analysis
sem3Subjects.description: Interpret balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and apply ratio analysis for decision-making.

sem3Subjects.name: Fundamentals of Digital Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Cover SEO, SEM, social media marketing, email marketing, content strategy, and digital campaign planning fundamentals.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital Business Design
sem3Subjects.description: Study digital business model creation, platform economics, customer journey mapping, and digital value proposition design.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Corporate Governance
sem4Subjects.description: Examine board structures, regulatory compliance, SEBI guidelines, and ethical governance frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: Project Work
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied research project on a digital marketing topic with data collection, analysis, and presentation.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Technologies and Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Apply web analytics, marketing automation tools, A/B testing frameworks, and data-driven campaign optimisation techniques.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Strategies for Business
sem4Subjects.description: Design integrated digital strategies covering omnichannel marketing, digital transformation roadmaps, and ROI measurement.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Uttaranchal University Online MBA specialisations. See the main Uttaranchal University Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Digital Marketing MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Digital marketing agencies, E-commerce companies, FMCG and retail (digital divisions), Media and publishing, EdTech and SaaS companies

**Entry-level roles:** Digital Marketing Executive, SEO Analyst, Social Media Manager, Performance Marketing Associate, Content Marketing Specialist

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Digital Marketing Manager, Growth Marketing Manager, Performance Marketing Manager, Marketing Analytics Manager, Brand Manager (Digital)

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of Digital Marketing, VP Marketing, Chief Marketing Officer, Director of Growth, Head of E-commerce

**Typical hiring organisations:** Flipkart, Amazon India, Zomato, Nykaa, BYJU'S, Unacademy, HCL Technologies, Infosys BPM, dentsu, GroupM, Ogilvy, WPP, HUL, ITC, Reliance Retail

skills.body:
The Digital Marketing specialisation builds skills tested by marketing and e-commerce employers:

**Technical skills:**
- SEO and SEM: keyword research, on-page optimisation, Google Ads campaign management, and search engine ranking strategy
- Social Media Marketing: platform-specific content strategy, community management, paid social campaign design, and influencer marketing
- Marketing Analytics: Google Analytics, campaign attribution modelling, A/B testing, and data-driven performance optimisation
- Digital Business Design: platform economics, customer journey mapping, and digital value chain analysis

**Applied skills:**
- Digital Strategy: omnichannel campaign planning, digital transformation roadmaps, and integrated marketing communication
- Marketing Automation: email marketing workflows, CRM integration, lead scoring, and nurture campaign design

**Soft skills:** Campaign performance presentation to stakeholders, cross-functional coordination with product and sales teams, budget allocation and ROI reporting, and vendor management for agency relationships.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Uttaranchal University Online MBA Digital Marketing against peers:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU does not offer a dedicated Digital Marketing specialisation. If you specifically want digital marketing depth, UU is the better choice at Rs 94,000 with four dedicated digital subjects.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias does not list Digital Marketing as a dedicated specialisation with the same subject depth. UU offers four spec-specific digital marketing subjects across Sem 3-4. Fee difference is minimal.

**vs Amity Online MBA Digital Marketing (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.4x the cost with NIRF #22, larger alumni network, and stronger brand recognition. Amity Digital Marketing carries more weight on a resume for agency and FMCG digital roles. If brand and network justify the premium for your career, Amity is stronger.

**vs LPU Online MBA Digital Marketing (Rs 1,61,000):** LPU offers NIRF #31, Coursera Plus bundle (which includes Google and Meta certifications), and stronger placement support. At 1.7x the cost, LPU offers meaningfully more for digital marketing careers.

**vs CU Online MBA (Rs 1,65,000):** Chandigarh University is NIRF #19 with PwC co-teaching modules. At 1.75x the cost, CU offers substantially better brand and industry integration.

**vs JIIT Online MBA (Rs 1,82,000):** JIIT offers mandatory internship and AI-integrated core, useful for analytics-heavy digital marketing roles. At nearly 2x the cost.

**vs DPU Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NIRF #41, NAAC A++. At 2x the cost, DPU offers higher accreditation grade and stronger Pune/Maharashtra brand.

fees.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Digital Marketing has a gross fee of Rs 1,40,000. A 30% Early Bird discount reduces the net fee across all payment tracks.

**Track 1: One-Time Payment**
- Net fee: Rs 94,000 (includes Rs 4,000 additional concession over semester track)
- Single payment at admission

**Track 2: Annual Payment**
- Rs 47,000 x 2 years = Rs 94,000 net
- Same net cost as one-time payment

**Track 3: Semester Payment**
- Rs 24,500 x 4 semesters = Rs 98,000 net
- Costs Rs 4,000 more than one-time or annual tracks

**No-Cost EMI:**
- Rs 3,956/month directly through the university
- No interest charged. No processing fee.

**Included:** Exam fee of Rs 2,500 per semester is included in all quoted figures.
**Not applicable:** No separate application fee. No scholarships beyond the Early Bird discount. No bundled perks.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Uttaranchal University each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Digital Marketing specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. It is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Uttaranchal University Online MBA Digital Marketing students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Aman
items.liked: Four dedicated digital marketing subjects gave me structured frameworks I was missing. The fee at Rs 94,000 is genuinely hard to beat for a NAAC A+ MBA.
items.disliked: No bundled Google Ads or HubSpot certifications. I had to get those separately on my own. Career services for digital roles were non-existent.
items.body: I have 3 years in performance marketing at a D2C brand. I needed the MBA credential for manager-level roles. UU delivered the degree at a price that made sense. The digital marketing subjects were academically sound but not cutting-edge. For practical tool skills, you still need to invest in platform certifications independently.

items.name: Priyanka
items.liked: Digital Technologies and Analytics was the strongest subject. The no-cost EMI option made it genuinely affordable on my freelancer income.
items.disliked: Brand recognition is limited. When I mention UU to agencies in Delhi or Mumbai, it does not carry the same weight as Amity or Manipal.
items.body: Good for Uttarakhand-based professionals or those who already have digital marketing experience and just need the MBA credential. If you are using this MBA to break into digital marketing for the first time, the programme alone will not be enough. You will need portfolio work and certifications alongside it.

items.name: Kunal
items.liked: Rs 24,500 per semester with exam fees included. No hidden charges. Digital Strategies for Business was a well-designed capstone-style subject.
items.disliked: The Early Bird discount is the only concession available. No merit scholarships or additional financial aid options.
items.body: I compared UU with LPU and Amity. LPU was Rs 67,000 more with Coursera Plus bundled. Amity was Rs 1.31 lakh more. I chose UU because I already had Google and Meta certifications from my agency job. For me, the MBA credential at NAAC A+ was the gap, not the tool skills. If you are in a similar position, UU Digital Marketing is the right call.

faqs.question: Does Uttaranchal University bundle Google Ads or Meta certifications with the Digital Marketing MBA?
faqs.answer: No. UU does not bundle platform certifications or tool access with the programme. You will need to obtain Google Ads, HubSpot, Meta Blueprint, or other certifications independently.

faqs.question: What is the net fee for UU Online MBA Digital Marketing?
faqs.answer: The gross fee is Rs 1,40,000. After the 30% Early Bird discount, the net fee is Rs 94,000 (one-time or annual) or Rs 98,000 (semester track). The semester track costs Rs 4,000 more.

faqs.question: Is UU Online MBA Digital Marketing suitable for someone new to digital marketing?
faqs.answer: The programme covers digital marketing fundamentals and strategy. However, it does not include hands-on tool training or platform certifications. Professionals new to digital marketing should supplement the MBA with practical certifications and portfolio projects.

faqs.question: Is the degree valid for government jobs?
faqs.answer: Yes. The programme is UGC-DEB approved. The degree is valid for government job applications, PSU recruitment, and higher education admission across India.

faqs.question: How does UU compare to LPU for Digital Marketing MBA?
faqs.answer: LPU is NIRF #31 at Rs 1,61,000 with Coursera Plus bundle and stronger placement support. UU is Rs 94,000 with NAAC A+ but no bundled certifications. LPU offers more for digital marketing careers at 1.7x the cost.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in Digital Marketing at under Rs 1 lakh total fee.
You already have digital marketing tool skills and certifications, and need the MBA credential at minimum cost.
You want no-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month with exam fees included and no hidden charges.
consider: If you need bundled platform certifications (Google, Meta, HubSpot), LPU at Rs 1.61L with Coursera Plus is a stronger package for digital marketing.
If brand recognition matters for agency or FMCG digital roles, Amity at Rs 2.25L (NIRF #22) carries more weight in hiring.
If you want industry co-teaching and stronger rankings, CU at Rs 1.65L (NIRF #19, PwC modules) offers better positioning.
